content: The innate curiosity drive of autonomous ICM-based curious agents can be re-purposed as a dynamic pruning and prioritization mechanism for cutting-edge 2024-2025 active learning agent long-term memory, where curiosity signal acts as a natural relevance filter instead of a reward for exploration. This framework eliminates the need for hand-engineered memory retention rules by letting the agent’s intrinsic desire to reduce uncertainty decide which experiences to store or discard.
